reachability_artifacts: go test ./internal/integration -run TestIntegrationReadyRealGitHistories exercises C-09 over committed status, report, rollback, and Git-tree evidence
release_benefit: Every later integration and ship adapter can ask one conservative question and receive a deterministic readiness answer.

positive_scenarios: Verified current evidence and both legal deferral forms satisfy one canonical predicate after all report, provenance, and rollback checks pass.
negative_scenarios: Raw deferred state, stale PASS, an unequal or deferred rollback, or unevaluable provenance never authorizes integration.
validation.benefit_hypothesis: One exhaustive readiness predicate prevents adapters from reintroducing permissive state-only gates.
